query:
SELECT 
  p.id, 
  p.name, 
  p.sku, 
  p.imageUrl as product_imageUrl,
  pi.imageUrl as primary_image_url,
  pi.isPrimary
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON p.id = pi.productId AND pi.isPrimary = true
WHERE p.id IN (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 5);
